title: PlanProposal
description: Envelope-composed Planner Role artifact. The payload is shaped to project onto daimyo's RolesPlanning PlanningResult with snake_case wire fields and no prose parsing.
$comment: Required payload fields are planning_goal, tasks, decision_requests, confidence, missing_context, review_required, and reason_codes. The shared envelope owns artifact identity, timestamps, refs, producer metadata, confidence, review gates, diagnostics, and top-level ownership.

planProposalPayload.title: PlanProposalPayload
planProposalPayload.description: Planner output that maps to daimyo's PlanningResult: tasks become PlannedTask entries and decision_requests become DecisionRequest payloads.

planning_goal.description: REQUIRED string. Goal or request the Planner decomposed.

tasks.description: REQUIRED ordered array. Each entry maps losslessly to daimyo's PlannedTask after snake_case to camelCase conversion.

decision_requests.description: REQUIRED array. Decision requests the caller must route before or during execution; empty means the plan can proceed without extra decisions.

missing_context.description: REQUIRED array. Context the Planner needed but did not have.

proposedPlanTask.title: ProposedPlanTask
proposedPlanTask.description: One ordered task proposed by the Planner. Field names intentionally mirror PlannedTask with protocol snake_case.

task_ref.description: OPTIONAL string. Planner-local stable reference for dependency links before a durable task id exists.

body.description: REQUIRED string. Proposed task objective/body, mapping to PlannedTask.body.

acceptance_criteria.description: REQUIRED array. Acceptance criteria mapping to PlannedTask.acceptanceCriteria.

depends_on.description: OPTIONAL array. Planner-local task_refs or existing task ids that must precede this task.

planTaskOrdering.title: PlanTaskOrdering
planTaskOrdering.description: OPTIONAL ordering hints beyond array position for adapters that need explicit before/after constraints.

after.description: OPTIONAL array. Planner-local task_refs or existing task ids that should execute before this task.

before.description: OPTIONAL array. Planner-local task_refs or existing task ids that should execute after this task.

priority.description: OPTIONAL integer. Lower numbers execute earlier when dependencies do not decide ordering.
